translated: It's got those emotional vibes, but how should I put it...
There are parts where we can all get hyped together with everyone,
and the lyrics are just wonderful. We also put a lot of thought into the jacket photo, didn't we?
We adjusted the positions over and over, even by just a tiny bit, because...
the look changes depending on the angle, so we kept...
going back and forth with the dance teacher. "Tomo-chan, a bit more this way," or "You two, move your faces closer." We did so many fine adjustments. I love that one part.
The part where our hands are joined and then we slowly layer them... No matter how many times I see it, I love it, but it also feels bittersweet.

It really feels like "after school." Like a normal, everyday after-school moment, but also like a very important after-school for them. The lyrics say "Let's meet again tomorrow," and they probably will meet, but you never really know for sure...
So I really felt the weight of those words, "See you tomorrow." It's just a fleeting moment,
but that's how it felt to me.
for the jacket photo, I find myself imagining what made Kanon and the others—all of Liella—decide to take this photo at that exact moment.
I wondered who took it, or if they just set up a camera. It was so much fun thinking about that

This song feels like "the now that isn't forever." It's packed with that fleeting sparkle unique to school idols and student life. Our costumes were "Aspire" this time, but if they weren't, the vibe would be totally different.
Definitely. Like if we wore school uniforms.
Man, if we did it in uniforms, I think I'd actually cry.
I'm already getting a bit teary just thinking about it. I think wearing the "Aspire" costumes is what's keeping me together.
You were looking a bit teary-eyed.
True, it was for the music.
Oh no, what if we performed this at a real school?
I'd end up squawking like a bird.
Part of me wants to do it someday, but another part of me really doesn't. Like, once we do it, it's over...
I'm not... I'm not doing it.
No way, I'm not doing it.
It's a song we all love.
Next, this is from Rieraji Name Romuromu-san.
Thank you! "Congrats on the 7th Live! (Thank you!) This was the first time in my life I was able to attend every single performance."
"The most memorable part for me was 'Universe,' performed at the Aichi show."
"The moment the intro started, and when the 2nd and 3rd years waved at me, I couldn't stop crying."
"I was so happy to be able to sing along with Liella and complete the live performance together."
"Thank you for such a wonderful and happy time."
"I live in Aichi, so I'd be very happy if you came back again."
Thank you! Next is from Rieraji Name Romatofu-san.
Thank you. "Congrats on all four shows of Liella! 7th LoveLive! FLY! Music World! (Thank you!) During the encore in Aichi, you performed 'Universe'."
"The five 1st-generation members used the whole main stage for their performance. I could feel the power and brilliance with my whole body, as if the 'Universe' was right there."
"Combined with the sense of unity from the 'Woah woah' calls, I love this song more and more every time I hear it live."
"I want to keep layering my voice with Liella's and make even more memories together."
